mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `screen_rental_detail` ( order_id, equipment_id, shop_id, business_circle_id, rental_year, rental_month, slot_count, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.orderId}, #{item.equipmentId}, #{item.shopId}, #{item.businessCircleId}, #{item.rentalYear}, #{item.rentalMonth}, #{item.slotCount}, #{item.status}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE `screen_rental_detail` SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
